channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: S&P 500, Nasdaq Hit New Highs As Tesla, Robinhood Lead; Nvidia Chipmaker On Tap
item.description: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit highs as Tesla, Robinhood and other former leaders soared. Nvidia chipmaker Taiwan Semi looms.

item.title: Ford EV and tech chief leaving automaker
item.description: Doug Field had stints at Apple and Tesla before joining Ford in 2021.

item.title: Gary Black Calls Tesla's FSD Approval In Europe 'Non-Event'—Here's Why
item.description: Investor Gary Black of The Future Fund LLC on Monday outlined multiple reasons why Tesla Inc.‘s Full Self-Driving (FSD) approval by the Netherlands Vehicle Authority (RDW) wasn’t significant. Tesla FSD Europe Approval A ‘Non-Event’ “WS [Wall Street] will view the approval of FSD in the Netherland...

item.title: Tesla's Stock Had One of Its Best Days in Months. Here's Why It Popped
item.description: Tesla shares popped nearly 8% after CEO Elon Musk touted advances in its latest chips on social media.

item.title: Democratic Senator slams X Money in blistering letter to Elon Musk
item.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) wrote a blistering letter to X Corp. owner Elon Musk on Apr. 14.

item.title: Stocks Spring Forward in Record-Breaking Day
item.description: Buoyed by big gains from the likes of Microsoft and Tesla, the S&P 500 rose 0.8% to 7022.95–rallying into the close to finish comfortably above its previous all-time high set in January. Technology stocks were the big outperformers.

item.title: Tech Stocks Power S&P 500 and Nasdaq to Records
item.description: Surging tech stocks carried the S&P 500 and Nasdaq composite to new records on Wednesday, a milestone in major indexes’ rebound from war-fueled losses. Buoyed by big gains from the likes of Microsoft and Tesla the S&P 500 rose 0.8% to 7022.95—rallying into the close to finish comfortably abov...

item.title: The Mystery Behind Tesla Stock’s Sudden Rise
item.description: The gain comes as TD Cowen analyst Itay Michaeli lowered his price target to $490 from $519. CEO Elon Musk appears to be one of the reasons for the stock’s jump. Early Wednesday, Musk tweeted a picture of a Tesla-designed microchip, dubbed AI5.

item.title: Tesla Regains 50-Day Line. Here's When The Stock Could Become Actionable.
item.description: On Wednesday, Tesla stock had one of its best days in months, as it looks to end an eight-week losing streak. Tesla stock could become actionable if it makes a decisive move above the 200-day line. Tesla is due to report first-quarter earnings on April 22.

item.title: Stocks making big moves yesterday: Globalstar, Tesla, HighPeak Energy, Shopify, and TransDigm
item.description: Check out the companies making headlines yesterday:

item.title: Uber and Lyft Gain 7% as Bold Bets on Robotaxis and Buybacks Reignite Investor Excitement
item.description: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) stock is up 7% today, rising from $72.91 to $77.76, while Lyft (NASDAQ:LYFT) stock is up 7% as well, climbing from $13.71 to $14.66. Both rideshare giants are surging midday as investors respond to a wave of autonomous vehicle commitments and shareholder-friendly cap...

item.title: Uber strengthens self-driving ambitions with new Lucid investment, analysts say
item.description: Uber Technologies Inc (NYSE:UBER, XETRA:UT8) has increased its investment in Lucid Group Inc (NASDAQ:LCID) and expanded its vehicle purchase commitment, signaling a stronger push into autonomous ride-hailing, according to Bank of America. The ride-hailing company will invest an additional...

item.title: Tesla intertwines FSD with in-house Insurance for attractive incentive
item.description: Tesla intertwined its Full Self-Driving (Supervised) suite with its in-house Insurance initiative in an effort to offer an attractive incentive to drivers. Tesla announced that its new Safety Score 3.0 will automatically have a perfect score of 100 with every mile driven with Full Self-Driving (S...

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Up 7%. Are Tweets Driving the Gains?
item.description: FEATURE Tesla stock is suddenly on fire. The reasons aren’t clear. CEO Elon Musk is the best explanation for the jump.

item.title: Tesla stock jumps 8% on AI chip milestone announcement
item.description: Investing.com -- Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) shares rose as much as 8% on Wednesday after Chief Executive Elon Musk announced the company’s chip design team completed the "tape out" of its AI5 chip.

item.title: Tesla ‘Full Self-Driving’ crashed through railroad gate seconds before train
item.description: A Texas Tesla owner says he punched the accelerator to outrun an oncoming train after his car on “Full Self-Driving” drove itself through a lowered railroad crossing arm as the train closed in on the tracks. Joshua Brown, who says he has logged more than 40,000 miles using Tesla’s driver assist, ...

item.title: Tesla finalizes AI5 chip design, Elon Musk makes bold claim on capability
item.description: Tesla has finalized its chip design for AI5, as Elon Musk confirmed today that the new chip has reached the tape-out stage, the final step before mass production. But in a brief reply on X, Musk clarified Tesla’s AI hardware roadmap, essentially confirming that the new chip will not be utilized f...

item.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Morgan Stanley, Bank of America, Tesla, Nvidia, Robinhood, Broadcom, Nike, and More
item.description: Shares of Morgan Stanley and Bank of America rise as a flood of bank earnings continues into a second day.

item.title: Spin Pressure On Tesla Stock Into A Return With A Cash-Secured Put
item.description: Tesla stock is down more than 20% from its 52-week high. This trade can generate a 13% annualized return or offer discounted shares.

item.title: Tesla Rockets 8% as AI5 Milestone and Rare Analyst Upgrade Remind Bears What This Stock Can Do
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) stock is up 8% in midday trading on Wednesday, rising from $364.20 to $392 as two catalysts hit the tape in quick succession. The move is drawing attention from both sides of a deeply divided investor base, and it’s the kind of day that reminds the bears exactly what this stoc...

item.title: Tesla Has Some Robot Competition
item.description: Tesla’s humanoids aren’t for sale yet, but China’s Unitree Robotics has some options. Unitree is now selling its cheapest humanoid robot on Alibaba’s AliExpress, according to Bloomberg. The R1 Humanoid Robot lists for $6,820.40 and is available for preorder now.

item.title: Elon Musk signals expansion of Tesla’s unique side business
item.description: Elon Musk has signaled an expansion of Tesla’s unique side business, something that really has nothing to do with cars or spaceships, but fans of the company have truly adopted it as just another one of its awesome ventures. Musk confirmed on Wednesday that Tesla would build a new Diner location ...

item.title: Elon Musk Hits Out At 'Tesla Killers' As EV Giant Outsells Rivals GM, Ford, Rivian In US
item.description: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk hit back at critics on Monday as the EV giant outsold all of its rivals in the U.S. domestic market during the first quarter of 2026.

item.title: Tesla Gets $360 Price Target as Traders Ask: How Much Will Terafab Really Cost?
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) stock heads into its April 22 Q1-2026 earnings report carrying a fresh set of questions that go well beyond the usual delivery count and margin debate. Barclays is keeping an Equal Weight rating with a $360 price target, and the firm’s central concern is one that could reshape...

item.title: Elon Musk Once Called Instagram A 'Thirst Trap,' Deleted His Account: Billionaire Could Be Back To Promote SpaceX IPO
item.description: Billionaire Elon Musk has shared a distaste for social media platforms from Meta Platforms over the years. Meta-owned Instagram and rival social media platform TikTok, which is now owned by a group of American companies, may have attracted Musk to use platforms outside his X platform owned by xAI...

item.title: Tesla Inc. (TSLA) Stock Outlook Reflects Changing Investor Appetite
item.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the best energy storage stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On April 9, GLJ Research analyst Gordon Johnson reiterated a Sell rating on Tesla Inc.

item.title: Tesla taped out AI5 chip, Musk says — nearly 2 years behind schedule
item.description: Tesla has taped out its next-generation AI5 self-driving chip, CEO Elon Musk said overnight, a key milestone that sends the final design to the foundry for fabrication. The tape-out comes nearly two years after Tesla originally promised AI5 would be in vehicles, and it still leaves volume product...

item.title: Tesla Tapes Out AI5 Self-Driving Chip
item.description: The milestone moves Tesla's next-generation driving hardware one step closer to production.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

item.title: Tesla’s Biggets Robotaxi Rivals Are From China
item.description: While investors in Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) keep an eye on the success of its Robotaxi business and the progress of rival Waymo (owned by Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG), real competition is sneaking around the corner and testing its vehicles in the Middle East. Waymo gained some ground recently as it gets r...

item.title: Tesla is making just 250 final Model S cars at $159,420 each — and then it's gone forever
item.description: Tesla is retiring the Model S and X with a $160K limited "Signature" farewell run. But is it worth buying? Here's what you need to know about these models and whether they're worth the $60K increase.

item.title: Tesla’s Chinese Robot Rival Ramps Pre-IPO Global Push
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Unitree Robotics began selling its cheapest humanoid robot on Alibaba Group Holding Ltd.’s AliExpress on Wednesday, expanding its international presence in a white-hot race featuring heavyweight players like Elon Musk’s Tesla Inc.Hangzhou-based Unitree’s R1 model will cost roughly ...

item.title: Elon Musk’s X Launches Smart Cashtags for BTC, ETH, XRP, DOGE, MSTR, COIN, Others
item.description: Elon Musk’s X has officially debuted Smart Cashtags for stocks and crypto. This new feature adds interactive, real-time financial data to users’ timelines. It supports major crypto and stocks cashtags such as BTC, ETH, XRP, SOL, DOGE, TSLA, MSTR, and COIN.

item.title: The Starship V3 static fire everyone was waiting for just happened
item.description: SpaceX is that much closer to launching their next-gen Starship after completing today’s full duration static fire of all 33 Raptor 3 engines out of Starbase, Texas. This marks the most powerful rocket engine test ever conducted and a direct signal that Flight 12, the maiden voyage of Starship V3...

item.title: Billionaire Tim Draper doubles down on bold Bitcoin target
item.description: Billionaire venture capitalist Tim Draper has never shied away from advocating Bitcoin (BTC), no matter what Wall Street thinks. Draper was among the earlier investors in Elon Musk's Tesla (Nasdaq: TSLA) in 2006, long before the EV car maker experimented with Bitcoin payments and built a ...

item.title: MAGS ETF faces its ultimate millionaire test
item.description: Seven stocks have dominated the U.S. market for the better part of three years, and one ETF lets you own all of them. The Roundhill Magnificent Seven ETF (MAGS) holds Apple, Microsoft, Amazon, Alphabet, Nvidia, Meta Platforms, and Tesla in a single fund.

item.title: UBS resets Tesla stock price for the rest of 2026
item.description: Tesla has dropped more than 21% in 2026. UBS had been one of the bears. On April 14, that changed.

item.title: Tesla Stock Climbs After UBS Upgrade Ahead of Earnings
item.description: Tesla Gains as AI Bets Help Offset Slowing EV Demand Concerns

item.title: RBC analyst slashes 3 key auto price targets
item.description: This week, analysts at RBC Capital told investors what they already know: The electric vehicle market is not in great shape. So the firm lowered its price targets on Tesla, Ford, and Lucid, though it also maintained its outperform rating on Tesla. It's quite the turnaround for the EV market that ...

item.title: Tesla stock upgraded, CarMax Q4 earnings disappoint Wall Street
item.description: Yahoo Finance anchor Josh Lipton tracks Tuesday's top-moving stocks and biggest market stories. Tesla (TSLA) stock was upgraded to Neutral from Sell by UBS analysts. CarMax (KMX) stock is sinking after the company's fourth quarter earnings results disappointed Wall Street.

item.title: Amazon Rises 5%, Globalstar Jumps 10% as $11.57 Billion Acquisition Ignites a Satellite War With SpaceX
item.description: Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) stock is up 5% today, rising from $239.89 to $252, after the company announced a blockbuster $11.57 billion acquisition of Globalstar (NASDAQ:GSAT). The deal is designed to turbocharge Amazon’s Project Kuiper satellite broadband initiative and put it in direct competition wit...

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving shows stunning maneuver in Europe to silence skeptics
item.description: Tesla Full Self-Driving, fresh on the heels of its approval for operation on European roads for the first time, showed off a stunning maneuver that will certainly silence any skeptics on the continent. Fresh off its approval in the Netherlands , Full Self-Driving is working toward a significant e...

item.title: Tesla Stock Rises on an Upgrade. AI Progress Will Come.
item.description: Tuesday, UBS analyst Joseph Spak upgraded Tesla stock to Hold from Sell. Tesla stock was up 3.7% at $365.48 in midday trading, while the and were up 1% and 0.5%, respectively. Coming into Tuesday trading, Tesla stock was down 22% so far this year and up 40% over the past 12 months.

item.title: Which Underperforming "Magnificent Seven" Stock Is the Better Buy in 2026: Tesla or Microsoft?
item.description: These stocks are both down more than 20% this year.

item.title: UBS Upgrades Tesla Stock, But Sees No 'Meaningful Scaling' Of Robotaxis
item.description: UBS upgraded Tesla to a neutral rating on Tuesday, but doesn't expect "meaningful" robotaxi scaling. Tesla stock rose, extending a win streak,

item.title: Rivian partners with Tesla co-founder’s Redwood on energy storage
item.description: Rivian is partnering with Redwood Materials, the battery company founded by Tesla co-founder JB Straubel, to build a second-life battery energy storage system at its EV manufacturing plant in Normal, Illinois. The initial deployment will use more than 100 used Rivian battery packs stitched togeth...

item.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Wells Fargo, Citigroup, JPMorgan, Globalstar, American, Tesla, J&J, Intel, Credo, and More
item.description: Wells Fargo, Citigroup, and JPMorgan Chase trade mixed after the banking giants post quarterly earnings.

item.title: Tesla utilizes its ‘Rave Cave’ for new awesome safety feature
item.description: Tesla is utilizing its ‘Rave Cave’ for an awesome new safety feature that will arrive with the upcoming Spring Update for 2026. Part of the massive interior overhaul of both the Model 3 “Highland” and Model Y “Juniper” was the addition of interior accent lighting to help bring out the mood of the...

item.title: How The Tesla (TSLA) Narrative Is Shifting With AI Ambitions And Mixed Analyst Targets
item.description: Tesla’s updated analyst narrative now incorporates a slightly lower core fair value estimate, moving from US$421.27 to US$415.30. This reflects a modest reset in price targets. That change mirrors what you are seeing across Street research, where some firms are lifting targets and others are trim...

item.title: Tesla Shares Seen Fairly Balancing EV Demand Headwinds, AI Ambitions, UBS Says
item.description: Tesla's (TSLA) recent share-price pullback now better reflects softer electric-vehicle demand and th
